text.title: Swipe File Tweet Hooks Decision Tree
text.summary: Run-or-skip gate based on preconditions, then a second-level question routing to a rule-id conclusion. Minimum-form tree for a methodology of this shape.

decision-tree.root-question: Are ≥20 source tweets identified AND hook taxonomy decided?

branch.question: Is attribution policy declared AND storage path decided?

branch.conclusion: Produce config: tagged entries + sources + baselines.
Pause; declare attribution policy + storage path before curation.
Skip this methodology. Curate 20+ sources + decide taxonomy first.

text.example: sources=22 taxonomy=[contrarian,curious-gap,list-of-n,personal-failure,data-reveal] policy=adapt-credit path=repo/swipes.yml → build config per r1.
